category_sources: source_facts.description: Archival restoration tool for databases; official WAL-G docs describe backup and restore support for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, SQL Server, MongoDB, Redis, and other databases.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: wal-g; official docs and repository use WAL-G.
docs_sources: Official WAL-G documentation is hosted on Read the Docs and mirrored from the official repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/wal-g/wal-g; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies database archival restoration; source_facts.executables lists database-specific WAL-G binaries for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQL Server, FoundationDB, Greenplum, and etcd.
